input.command:
cd "/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/claude_code_aljazeeraQ12026v37_glm52_r00/26-06-14-19-17-03/agents/minimalHarness_glm-52[1m]_001/workspace"
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
python3 -c "
import json,csv
m=json.load(open('memory/forecasts_master.json'))
active=set(r['qid'].strip() for r in csv.DictReader(open('market.csv')) if r['is_resolved'].strip()!='True')
hi=[]
for k,v in m.items():
    if k not in active: continue
    if isinstance(v,dict) and v.get('_abstain'): continue
    v2={o:p for o,p in v.items() if not str(o).startswith('_')}
    if v2:
        t=max(v2.values())
        if t>0.4: hi.append((round(t,2),k,max(v2,key=v2.get)))
for t,k,n in sorted(hi,reverse=True): print(f'  {k}: {n}={t}')
print('count>0.4:',len(hi))
"
